CPSA101 College Park Scholars: Arts First-Year Colloquium II (1-2 Credits)

Introductory colloquium II: Arts workshops and Arts Festival. Prerequisite: CPSA100.

Restriction: Students must be matriculated into the College Park Scholars Arts (CPSA) program.

CPSA149 College Park Scholars: Arts Service-Learning Outreach (2 Credits)
